TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Parupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 158 buwan, 446 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 162 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Parupu hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Parupu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Parupu hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Parupu hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Parupu hya' ga Takofan. tay mkyahu' na Parupu hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Parupu hya' ga Ciwcia. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Parupu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Parupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ parupu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa tako*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔzil na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ parupu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ parupu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Parupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 158 buwan, 446 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 162 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Parupu hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Parupu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Parupu hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Parupu hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Parupu hya' ga Takofan. tay mkyahu' na Parupu hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Parupu hya' ga Ciwcia. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Parupu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Parupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ parupu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa tako*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔzil na parupu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ parupu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ parupu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
